results.command:
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
  "/data/tmp/frankenredis-pass177-current-target/release-perf/frankenredis" --bind 127.0.0.1 --port 6492 >"artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-coralox-pass177/baseline-borrow-value-hset-server.log" 2>&1 &
  pid=$!
  trap '\''kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid 2>/dev/null || true'\'' EXIT
  for _ in {1..100}; do
    if nc -z 127.0.0.1 6492 >/dev/null 2>&1; then break; fi
    sleep 0.02
  done
  "/data/tmp/frankenredis-pass177-current-target/release-perf/fr-bench" --host 127.0.0.1 --port 6492 --workload hset --pipeline 16 --clients 50 --requests 3000000 --json-out "artifacts/optimization/frankenredis-coralox-pass177/baseline-borrow-value-hset-last.json" --key-prefix pass177-baseline
'
